# Pull Request Template

Please choose the path that matches your change.

## ✅ Edit a wiki page
- Describe the edit in plain language.
- Mention which wiki pages, entities, or concepts were updated.
- If this was a content improvement, include why the change is important.

## 📄 Add a new source
- Added raw source file under `raw-public/`
- Explain what the source is and why it matters
- Describe the topics or concepts to ingest from the source
- Leave the source file in `raw-public/` so maintainers can ingest it via the CLAUDE.md workflow.
